chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.20 of 2021 Aziz-ur-Rehman Chaudhry Versus Captain Muhammad Aijaz Haroon & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 263/21 2. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 264/21 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 23.10.2023 None present. -.-.- No one is present on behalf of the appellant. There is no intimation either. This appeal is barred by time and an application under section 5 of Limitation Act is filed along with main appeal. No plausible reason has been provide in the affidavit filed in support of such application, though it is claimed that the appellant is 75 years old and is a blood pressure patient. This could hardly be an excuse for a litigant, unless some medical certificates are appended to show that he was prevented for sufficient cause from filing this appeal within the time frame provided under the law. Instant High Court Appeal as such is dismissed as being barred by time along with listed applications. Judge Judge
